summary: The diff implements Free Fire battle-themed UI updates across multiple components and pages. REQ-27 (battle backgrounds), REQ-28 (color scheme and theme), and REQ-29 (owner name display) are all implemented. The owner name 'NIRANJAN' is prominently displayed in the navigation with Free Fire styling. Backgrounds use ff-battle-bg and ff-header-bg images with overlays. Color scheme includes Free Fire orange, cyan, gold, red, and green palette with glow effects. All gaming components (buttons, cards, navigation) now use Free Fire battle-inspired styling with gradients, shadows, and battle UI elements.
